name: 140-Character Love
overview: Shohei Tsubutani spend his days daydreaming based on novels he finds on Twitter. He finds another user with the same passion who he names "my Twitter girlfriend", Itoka Tsuji. One day, she moves in the room next to his...

trailers.title: 【#つぶ恋】ドラマDELI「140字の恋」第1話予告編【3月5日（金）深夜スタート！】
